name: Bakuchiol
description: A natural, plant-based alternative to retinol that offers similar benefits without the irritation.
scientificSummary: Activates the same receptors as retinol to stimulate collagen production and speed cell turnover.
mechanismOfAction: Activates the same receptors as retinol to stimulate collagen production and speed cell turnover.
